segments.text: Both of them perform really well on Town & City, you know
segments.original_text: お互いに村町結構強いイメージありますけどね

segments.text: I can't help but anticipate when Town & City comes up in the stage selection
segments.original_text: 村と町が出てくるタイミングをどうしても期待してしまうんですが

segments.text: Small Battlefield ranks just outside the top 5
segments.original_text: まずは小戦場5位の下といったところ

full_text: Both of them perform really well on Town & City, you know I can't help but anticipate when Town & City comes up in the stage selection Small Battlefield ranks just outside the top 5 Edgeguard secured! Once off the ledge...
